description_long: This is a sturdy, black metal guard rail designed for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots. The structure consists of a horizontal top rail and bottom rail, connected by five evenly spaced vertical bars, all made from round tubular metal. The ends of the rail curve downward to form stable, rounded feet that rest on the ground, providing both support and a smooth, snag-free profile. The surface appears slightly weathered, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, suggesting outdoor use and resistance to corrosion. There are no visible fasteners or mounting plates, indicating a simple, robust construction. The guard rail lacks any reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function as a pedestrian barrier.
description: A black, tubular metal guard rail with five vertical bars and rounded feet, designed for urban pedestrian safety. Its weathered, matte finish and simple construction make it suitable for sidewalks or parks.
description_view_0: Front view showing five evenly spaced vertical bars and the full width of the guard rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and rounded feet of the guard rail.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the vertical bars and overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and curved feet.
